# ANALYSIS: OPRA_SIM_VERIFICATION_2026-06-01

**Filed:** 2026-06-01
**Filer:** chef-nemotron
**Type:** verification
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Running the realistic OPRA simulator (simulator_real.py) on the three J winner days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) will produce P&L within ±20% of the source-of-truth values (+$342, +$470, +$730), confirming the simulator's fidelity for OP-20 disclosure 4.

## Mechanism

Execute simulator_real.py with the current production strategy (heartbeat.md + params.json) for each date, capturing total P&L. Compare to source-of-truth; compute percent difference. If all three are within ±20%, the verification passes.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior (source-of-truth) | Proposed behavior (simulator output) | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | +$342 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown |
| 5/04 winner | +$730 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (as per OP-20).
2. **Sample bias:** sample size = 3 days (J winner days); selection method = source-of-truth winners; overfit risk = low (these are the anchor days used for OP-16).
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (this verification is in-sample on anchor days; OOS not applicable).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (we are using simulator_real.py which models bid/ask/spread; still needs validation against actual OPRA fills).
5. **Failure modes:** worst day = simulator error >20% on any anchor day; max drawdown = not applicable; blow-up scenario = simulator mispricing leads to systematic edge overestimation.
6. **Concentration:** top-5 days = 100% of P&L for this verification (only three days); state X = 100%.

## Pre-merge gate

- simulator_real.py must run without errors on the three dates.
- Output P&L must be within ±20% of source-of-truth for each day.
- If any day fails, investigate and adjust simulator parameters (e.g., slippage model) before re-running.

## Confidence

5 / 10 -- we have not yet run the simulator; confidence pending actual results.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This verification does not conflict with any existing candidates; it supports the OP-20 disclosure requirement for all candidates that rely on simulator_real.py for real-fills validation.
